case_title: NIKIIYA KELLY VS. AIMCO PROPERTIES, L.P.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, NIKIIYA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO PROPERTIES, L.P.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, NIKIIYA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KELLY, NIKIIYA AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO PROPERTIES, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, NIKIIYA AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO PROPERTIES, L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY, NIKIIYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIMCO PROPERTIES, L.P. $633.99 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $633.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
